statement: In every magma, Equation 1554 (`x = (y * z) * (x * (x * z))`) implies Equation 413 (`x = x * (x * (x * (y * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0235
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y z) (op x (op x z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op x (op x (op y x))))
